HiFi Full-length 16S Analysis Report

Summary QC statistics

  • Samples number: 44
  • Final samples number post-DADA2: 44
  • Missing samples (Not enough reads, do not pass QC, etc):
  • Total number of CCS reads before filtering and primers trimming: 896502
  • Was primers trimmed prior to DADA2? Yes
  • Note that if downsampling was enabled, the reads will be filtered first, then restricted to a maximum of N reads.
  • Total number of reads after quality filtering: 895523 (99.89%)
  • Total number of reads after primers trimming (DADA2 input): 888641 (99.23%)
  • Total number of ASVs found: 817
  • Average number of ASVs per sample: 41
  • Total number of reads in 817 ASVs: 598866 (67.39% of all input reads)

Classification using VSEARCH with a single database

  • ASVs classified at Species level: 658 (80.54%)
  • Percentage reads belong to ASV classified at Species level: 99%
  • ASVs classified at Genus level: 671 (82.13%)
  • Percentage reads belong to ASV classified at Genus level: 99%

Classification using Naive Bayes classifier with Greengenes2, GTDB and Silva

  • ASVs classified at Species level: 773 (94.61%)
  • Percentage reads belong to ASV classified at Species level: 99%
  • ASVs classified at Genus level: 811 (99.27%)
  • Percentage reads belong to ASV classified at Genus level: 100%

Overall reads filtering and number of full-length reads

  • Full-length reads are defined as reads with both F27 and R1492 primers
  • Note that full length counts column will only show if cutadapt was used to trim primers (default).

Input reads QC (Before filtering and primers removal)

Top Taxa and Plots

  • For interactive view, use the Emperor QZV output from QIIME2 in results/core-metrics-diversity folder with QIIME2 View
  • Note that if the distances between all samples are zero for a specific method, the plots will not be shown.
  • MDS plots use ASVs as input.
  • Samples might be missing due to choice of rarefecation depth. Rerun pipeline with -resume --rarefaction_depth X to choose a custom rarefaction depth X.

Bray-Curtis MDS plot

Weighted and Unweighted Unifrac MDS plot

Top 50 ASVs (VSEARCH classification)

Top 10 Classified Genus (Collapsed to species) with VSEARCH

  • Relative abundance is calculated by dividing the number of reads for each ASV to the total number of reads in each sample.
  • Heatmap contains only species with >1% abundance in at least 2 samples for the top 10 genus.

Top 50 ASVs (Naive Bayes Classifier)

Top 10 Classified Genus (Collapsed to species) with Naive Bayes Classifier

  • Relative abundance is calculated by dividing the number of reads for each ASV to the total number of reads in each sample.
  • Heatmap contains only species with >1% abundance in at least 2 samples for the top 10 genus.
